services.title: MyTxGNN Drug Interaction Check
services.description: Check for potential drug-drug interactions (PDDI) in prescriptions based on DDInter 2.0 database. Provides contextualized clinical alerts and management recommendations.

services.title: MyTxGNN Drug Repurposing Candidates
services.description: Based on TxGNN knowledge graph, provide drug repurposing prediction candidates for patient medications. Assists clinical decision-making and clinical trial matching.
services.usageRequirements: Requires MedicationRequest and Condition read access

services.title: MyTxGNN Clinical Trial Matching
services.description: Automatically search ClinicalTrials.gov for relevant clinical trials based on patient medications and diagnoses.
services.usageRequirements: Requires MedicationRequest and Condition read access
